Main Street Capital Access Atlas
Home Explore Illinois Methodology Limitations Sources Contribute

Source transparency

Sources

Every source is tracked with access method, fetch status, coverage, and limitations. Optional and manual sources are displayed even when absent.

Public export

Download the dataset and dictionary

Each build publishes county data, map data, source status, checksums, and a generated data dictionary so public users can inspect the fields without reading the pipeline code.

County CSV Data dictionary CSV Source manifest JSON Data package manifest

Reuse responsibly

Attribution and citation

Cite this open-source project separately from the underlying public datasets. The source manifest lists dataset names, publishers, URLs, access methods, limitations, and current build status.

Project citation

Use the repository citation file when available, and include the generated data package date when publishing analysis from county exports.

Source attribution

Preserve attribution for Census, FDIC, and any manual public sources added to the build. Source publishers do not endorse project interpretations.

Map attribution

The interactive map uses Leaflet and OpenStreetMap tiles. Keep map attribution visible when reusing screenshots or map views.

Open-data inventory

Source manifest

Statuses reflect the current build. Manual and optional-token sources are supported without blocking the default public-data build.

2023 Census Cartographic Boundary File, Counties

available
Publisher
U.S. Census Bureau
Use in the atlas
U.S. counties and county equivalents represented in Census cartographic files
Access method
Automated download of official cartographic boundary shapefile
Last fetched or registered
2026-07-01T10:33:08Z
Known limitations
Geometry is simplified for thematic mapping and is not a legal boundary product.
Open public source

2023 County Business Patterns

available
Publisher
U.S. Census Bureau
Use in the atlas
County-level establishments, employment, and annual payroll where reported by CBP
Access method
Automated download of official County Business Patterns county file
Last fetched or registered
2026-07-01T10:33:10Z
Known limitations
CBP covers establishments with paid employees. Some employment/payroll cells may be suppressed or noise-infused under Census disclosure rules.
Open public source

Vintage 2025 County Population Estimates

available
Publisher
U.S. Census Bureau Population Estimates Program
Use in the atlas
County-level resident population estimates for counties and county equivalents
Access method
Automated download of official county population estimates CSV
Last fetched or registered
2026-07-01T10:33:10Z
Known limitations
Population estimates are revised by vintage and use boundaries from the estimate series. They provide denominator context but do not measure household stress or local resources.
Open public source

2024 Small Area Income and Poverty Estimates

available
Publisher
U.S. Census Bureau Small Area Income and Poverty Estimates Program
Use in the atlas
County-level income and poverty estimates for states and the District of Columbia
Access method
Automated download of official all-counties Excel workbook
Last fetched or registered
2026-07-01T10:33:11Z
Known limitations
SAIPE estimates are model-based and designed for federal program administration. They are useful economic context but do not replace local verification or ACS detail.
Open public source

2023 ACS 5-year detailed tables

available
Publisher
U.S. Census Bureau
Use in the atlas
County-level ACS indicators when API access is configured
Access method
Census API; optional CENSUS_API_KEY environment variable
Last fetched or registered
2026-07-01T10:33:33Z
Known limitations
ACS is survey-based, lagged, and includes margins of error. The default build marks this source unavailable when no Census API key is present.
Open public source

FDIC BankFind Suite branch locations

available
Publisher
Federal Deposit Insurance Corporation
Use in the atlas
Open FDIC BankFind branch location records aggregated to county where matched
Access method
FDIC BankFind public API
Last fetched or registered
2026-07-01T10:33:41Z
Known limitations
County matching uses branch county and state names against Census county names. Branch presence is not a full measure of local capital access.
Open public source

FDIC Summary of Deposits

available
Publisher
Federal Deposit Insurance Corporation
Use in the atlas
County-level branch deposit survey records aggregated from the latest available SOD year
Access method
FDIC BankFind Summary of Deposits public API
Last fetched or registered
2026-07-01T10:33:46Z
Known limitations
Deposits are reported by branch office and are not a direct measure of small-business lending, credit access, or local reinvestment.
Open public source

BLS Local Area Unemployment Statistics county import

manual optional
Publisher
U.S. Bureau of Labor Statistics
Use in the atlas
County-level annual unemployment rate when a user-provided CSV is present
Access method
Manual CSV adapter: data/manual/bls_laus_county.csv
Last fetched or registered
Not fetched in this build
Known limitations
BLS LAUS is the preferred public source for local unemployment rates, but BLS bulk downloads may restrict automated retrieval. This adapter never fabricates values when the manual county file is absent.
Open public source

2024 FFIEC CRA small-business lending aggregate county file

unavailable
Publisher
Federal Financial Institutions Examination Council
Use in the atlas
County-level CRA small-business loan originations when FFIEC flat files are reachable
Access method
Automated FFIEC CRA aggregate flat-file zip with manual fallback
Last fetched or registered
Not fetched in this build
Known limitations
CRA small-business data covers reporting depository institutions and is not comprehensive of all small-business credit. FFIEC may block scripted flat-file downloads in some local environments; blocked fetches are marked unavailable rather than filled with invented data.
Open public source

SBA 7(a)/504 lending county aggregate

available
Publisher
U.S. Small Business Administration
Use in the atlas
County-level SBA lending activity from latest available public FOIA current-period files
Access method
Automated SBA Open Data CKAN API with strict county aggregation
Last fetched or registered
2026-07-01T10:33:56Z
Known limitations
SBA FOIA source files include row-level public borrower records in ignored raw cache files; only county aggregates are published. County matching uses SBA project county and state names.
Open public source

Certified CDFI county aggregate

available
Publisher
Community Development Financial Institutions Fund
Use in the atlas
County-level certified CDFI headquarters count from public certified CDFI list
Access method
Automated CDFI Fund certified list plus Census ZCTA-county relationship file
Last fetched or registered
2026-07-01T10:33:58Z
Known limitations
CDFI headquarters counts do not measure service areas, lending volume, or relationship strength. ZIP-to-county assignment uses the largest 2020 Census ZCTA-county land/water overlap.
Open public source

HUD Fair Market Rents / Income Limits county context

unavailable
Publisher
U.S. Department of Housing and Urban Development
Use in the atlas
County-level housing pressure context when configured or supplied
Access method
HUD Fair Market Rents API with optional HUD_API_TOKEN
Last fetched or registered
Not fetched in this build
Known limitations
HUD API access requires a HUD User token. FMR-to-income context uses the latest available HUD two-bedroom FMR and Census SAIPE median household income when both are present.
Open public source
Main Street Capital Access Atlas

Public data to start better conversations about small-business support. Built independently; no private data.

This project is built independently using public data. It is not affiliated with, endorsed by, or sponsored by any financial institution, government agency, or data publisher.

Contribute Methodology Limitations Sources Accessibility Data dictionary Source manifest
